case_title: ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC VS BOYE-GUZMAN, HUGO IND.DBA IL CAHUIN RESTAURANT

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOYE-GUZMAN, HUGO IND.DBA IL CAHUIN RESTAURANT $2,237.09 PRINCIPAL, $62.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,299.59, PAYABLE AT $100 PER MONTH IN SIX MONTHS BEGINNING 10/01/94 TO 3/01/95 THEN SEE OTHER TERMS ABOVE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,237.09 FILED BY ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC AS TO DEFENDANT BOYE-GUZMAN, HUGO IND.DBA IL CAHUIN RESTAURANT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BOYE-GUZMAN, HUGO IND.DBA IL CAHUIN RESTAURANT
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BOYE-GUZMAN, HUGO IND.DBA IL CAHUIN RESTAURANT
